channel.title: Iambic Pentameter on Aman Ahuja
channel.description: Recent content in Iambic Pentameter on Aman Ahuja

item.title: A poem by a twitter bot
item.description:
Originally published on my old blog, Pafnuty blog. Reposted here as an effort to consolidate writing into one place. The original publication date was: November 27, 2012.

Reposted June 2026. This twitter bot “Pentametron” would collect tweets that were (usually accidentally) in the right meter, and compose them into a poem with rhyme. I like that when it tweeted it gave credit to each of the authors.

The website is still up: https://pentametron.com/ but on twitter @pentametron posts are “protected” for approved users only.
